_meta.description: Single source of truth for cascade task execution. AI agents MUST read this file before starting any work.

phases.name: Refactoring - content.js decomposition
phases.gate: ALL P0 tasks must be COMPLETED before P1 tasks become READY

tasks.title: Setup esbuild: package.json, esbuild.config.mjs, entry point src/content/main.js
tasks.acceptance: npm run build produces content.js from modules. Built file is functionally equivalent to original (FAB, sidebar, parsing). Extension loads without errors.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Search for all functions from original in built bundle. No undefined errors on load.

tasks.title: Extract lib/selectors.js: HH_SELECTORS + findElement/findAllElements
tasks.acceptance: Module contains 47+ selector groups. findElement works correctly when imported. DevTools: window.__testSelectors works.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Every selector verified on real hh.ru page via DevTools. No hashed Magritte classes.

tasks.title: Extract lib/anti-hallucination.js: safeGetText, safeGetAttr, validateVacancyData, etc.
tasks.acceptance: All functions return concrete types. safeClick(null) = false. waitForElement with timeout=1000 returns null in 1 sec.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Tested with null, undefined, empty strings, invisible elements. No exceptions.

tasks.title: Extract lib/storage.js: DEFAULT_SETTINGS, DEFAULT_STATS, getAllSettings, etc.
tasks.acceptance: All functions via chrome.storage.local. addEventLog writes with timestamp. getEventLogs(10) returns last 10. Blacklist works correctly.
tasks.anti_hallucination: All async in try/catch. chrome.storage.local.get with non-existent key doesn't crash. getStats() always object with numbers.

tasks.title: Extract lib/timing.js: gaussianRandom, randomDelay, simulateReading, simulateTyping
tasks.acceptance: gaussianRandom(10,4) in range ~2-20. simulateTyping char-by-char 30-120ms. simulateLongPause 25-40 sec.
tasks.anti_hallucination: gaussianRandom never negative. simulateTyping checks readonly.

tasks.title: Extract lib/rate-limiter.js: class RateLimiter with private fields + getProgress/reset/exportState
tasks.acceptance: check() returns {allowed, reason?, waitMs?}. Burst >= 5 blocks. getProgress() correct numbers.
tasks.anti_hallucination: adaptiveFactor doesn't exceed 5.0. hourlyCount resets on hour change. check() doesn't block forever.

tasks.title: Extract parser modules: vacancy-list, resume-list, resume-detail, vacancy-detail(stub), negotiations(stub)
tasks.acceptance: Each module compiles and exports a function. parseVacanciesFromPage identical to original. parseResume 12 fields.
tasks.anti_hallucination: parseVacanciesFromPage returns [] when absent (not null). _debug contains found/missing.

tasks.title: Extract UI modules: fab, panel, tabs/{overview,resumes,vacancies,negotiations,settings,logs}. CSS as string export.
tasks.acceptance: FAB displays. Shadow DOM isolated. Tabs switch. Resumes and vacancies display.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Shadow DOM mode=closed prevents external access. innerHTML uses escapeHtml. No memory leaks.

tasks.title: Boot sequence: src/content/main.js. Order: logger init, auth gate, detectPageType, run parser, create FAB+panel, SPA observer, pendingApply check
tasks.acceptance: main.js loads without errors. FAB on all hh.ru pages. Auth gate blocks for unauthenticated. SPA observer restarts parsing.
tasks.anti_hallucination: detectPageType correct with query params. Auth gate no false negatives. Boot doesn't block page load.

phases.name: Core Parsing Enhancement
phases.gate: ALL P0 tasks COMPLETED. P1 P0 tasks can start, P1 P1 tasks wait for P0 within phase.

tasks.title: parseVacancyDetail() in parsers/vacancy-detail.js
tasks.acceptance: On real vacancy page extracts all fields. parseInt('Не указана') fallback 0. Experience '3-6 лет' -> {min:3,max:6}. Skills array no duplicates.
tasks.anti_hallucination: parseInt never returns NaN. Word forms 'год/года/лет' handled. No crash on vacancies without salary/experience.

tasks.title: Vacancy page DOM diagnostics. Add selectors: vacancyDescriptionContent, vacancyKeySkills, etc.
tasks.acceptance: Each group 2+ selectors. diagnoseVacancyDOM dumps data-qa. All tested on real page.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Run on 5 different vacancies. No hashed Magritte classes. Stable data-qa and Bloko BEM.

tasks.title: parseNegotiations() in parsers/negotiations.js
tasks.acceptance: On negotiations page extracts list. Status from predefined values. Unread count = number.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Parser works on empty list. Status recognized for all states. Unread not string.

tasks.title: Negotiations selectors + diagnoseNegotiationsDOM()
tasks.acceptance: Selectors find elements. diagnoseNegotiationsDOM structured dump. Fallback chains.
tasks.anti_hallucination: No dependency on hashed classes. data-qa stable. Correct with long lists (50+).

tasks.title: lib/salary-parser.js: parseSalaryString, getSalaryMidpoint, isSalaryAcceptable
tasks.acceptance: parseSalaryString correct for all formats. getSalaryMidpoint({from:200000,to:300000}) = 250000. isSalaryAcceptable with tolerance.
tasks.anti_hallucination: parseInt with spaces works. null salary doesn't crash. USD/EUR/RUR recognized. No NaN.

tasks.title: lib/experience-parser.js: parseExperienceString, getExperienceYears, isExperienceMatch
tasks.acceptance: parseExperienceString all forms. isExperienceMatch({min:3,max:6}, 5) = true. Overqualification penalty.
tasks.anti_hallucination: All word forms. parseExperienceString(null) = {min:0,max:0}. Missing periods don't crash.

phases.name: Matching Engine
phases.gate: F1.1, F1.5, F1.6 must be COMPLETED before P2 starts

tasks.title: engine/matching.js: calculateMatchScore(vacancy, resume) -> {total:0-100, breakdown:{skills,salary,experience,position,location}}
tasks.acceptance: total in [0,100]. breakdown.skills via Jaccard. Perfect match total >= 90.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Jaccard for empty sets = 0 (not NaN). Salary null doesn't crash. Aliases without false matches.

tasks.title: engine/skill-gap.js: analyzeSkillGap(resumeSkills, marketSkills) -> [{skill, demand, have}]
tasks.acceptance: Returns top-5 missing. demand in percentages. have = true/false.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Empty skill array doesn't crash. Duplicates removed. Percentages 0-100.

tasks.title: Integrate matching into UI: vacancy matchScore, badge with %, filter by min score, sorting by score
tasks.acceptance: Each vacancy has score. Badge displays. Filter works. Sorting correct.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Score = 0 for vacancies without skills. Null score doesn't break sorting.

phases.name: Auto-Apply System
phases.gate: F2.1 must be COMPLETED before P3 starts

tasks.title: 5-step modal apply process in ui/components/apply-modal.js
tasks.acceptance: Modal displays 5 steps. Progress bar correct. Cancel button closes. Every action logged.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Apply button exists before click. Already-applied checked before step 2. Navigation doesn't crash on error.

tasks.title: engine/cover-letter.js: generateCoverLetter(vacancy, resume, template, tone)
tasks.acceptance: All variables replaced. Tone changes text style. Template saves/loads from storage.
tasks.anti_hallucination: {position} not left unreplaced. Empty fields give fallback. Tone doesn't break formatting.

tasks.title: Typing simulation in cover letter: char-by-char input via setter + dispatchEvent
tasks.acceptance: Each char appears with delay. Pauses on punctuation. Input events fire. textarea.value contains full text after completion.
tasks.anti_hallucination: setter from HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype.value works. readonly doesn't crash (check). All events bubbles:true.

tasks.title: Batch auto-apply: vacancy queue (sorted by matchScore desc), score filter, rateLimiter.check() pause, progress UI, pause/resume
tasks.acceptance: Queue shows vacancies by descending score. Pause between applies. Pause button works. Rate limiter blocks at limit.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Empty queue doesn't crash. Each vacancy checked for already-applied. Paused state saved on panel close.

phases.name: Negotiations and AI
phases.gate: F1.3 must be COMPLETED before P4 starts

tasks.title: UI tab Negotiations: chat list with company, position, last message, date, status, unread badge
tasks.acceptance: Tab displays list. Statuses colored. Unread badge. Refresh restarts parsing.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Empty list shows placeholder. Long text truncated with ellipsis. Status from predefined list.

tasks.title: services/ai-service.js: sendMessage via z-ai-web-dev-sdk through background script
tasks.acceptance: AI returns text. Cover letter generated from template + context. Chat response based on history.
tasks.anti_hallucination: AI timeout (30 sec) handled. Empty response doesn't crash. Rate limit on AI requests. Fallback when AI unavailable.

tasks.title: AI chat responses: read history, generate 3 variants, adapt tone, insert with typing simulation
tasks.acceptance: 3 response variants displayed. Tone adapted. Typing simulation on insert.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Chat history correctly extracted. Empty history gives fallback prompt. 3 variants always string array.

tasks.title: CAPTCHA detection: img[src*=captcha], .g-recaptcha, [data-qa*=captcha]. Auto-pause + badge + toast
tasks.acceptance: CAPTCHA on page -> auto-pause. Badge shows notification. Toast 'CAPTCHA detected'. Pause removed manually.
tasks.anti_hallucination: False positive doesn't block work. Multiple CAPTCHAs don't crash. Pause correctly removed.

phases.name: UI Enhancement
phases.gate: F0.8, F2.3, F3.4 must be COMPLETED before P5 starts

tasks.title: Full 6-tab panel: Overview, Resume, Vacancies, Negotiations, Settings, Logs
tasks.acceptance: All 6 tabs switch. Each tab displays corresponding data. Navigation without data loss.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Tab switching doesn't create memory leaks. Panel CSS doesn't affect hh.ru. Scroll inside tab doesn't scroll page.

tasks.title: Dark/light theme: CSS variables, toggle in settings, chrome.storage persistence
tasks.acceptance: Toggle works. Theme persists. Smooth transition. Panel doesn't flicker on switch.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Panel theme doesn't affect hh.ru styles. CSS variables have fallback values. Transition doesn't slow rendering.

tasks.title: KPI Dashboard: 4 cards (applied today, invitations, errors, total). Conversion funnel 5 stages
tasks.acceptance: KPI cards show current data. Funnel 5 levels. Numbers correct. Auto-refresh.
tasks.anti_hallucination: KPI doesn't show stale data. Funnel correct with zero values. Progress bars bounded [0,100].

tasks.title: Shimmer effect: CSS animation for high match score vacancies (>80%) not yet applied to
tasks.acceptance: Shimmer appears on recommended vacancies. Doesn't affect performance. Removed after apply.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Animation doesn't cause layout thrash. requestAnimationFrame for smooth. Shimmer removed after apply.

tasks.title: Match breakdown popup: 5 metrics with progress bars and values. Color coding green/yellow/red
tasks.acceptance: Breakdown shows 5 metrics. Colors correct. Values 0-100%. Closes on click outside.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Values bounded [0,100]. Null skills don't crash. Popup position doesn't overflow screen.

phases.name: Polish and Release
phases.gate: ALL P0/P1 tasks from P0-P5 must be COMPLETED

tasks.title: Extension icons: generate 16x16, 48x48, 128x128 PNG via z-ai-generate CLI
tasks.acceptance: 3 icons in icons/. manifest.json references all 3. Icons display in Chrome toolbar and chrome://extensions.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Files in correct PNG format. Exact sizes. Background transparency (or white).

tasks.title: Full documentation rewrite: README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CHANGELOG.md
tasks.acceptance: README describes current functionality. ARCHITECTURE describes modular structure. CHANGELOG contains all versions.
tasks.anti_hallucination: File names match links. No dead links. CHANGELOG versions match manifest.json.

tasks.title: Landing page: adapt hh-copilot-landing.html, deploy to GitHub Pages or Netlify
tasks.acceptance: Landing accessible by URL. All sections display. Responsive. SEO meta tags filled.
tasks.anti_hallucination: No broken links. Images load. Mobile version readable. PageSpeed > 80.

tasks.title: Chrome Web Store preparation: description, screenshots, category, privacy policy
tasks.acceptance: Zip archive ready. Description filled. 3 screenshots. Category Productivity.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Zip <= 10MB. manifest.json valid. No deprecated permissions. All permissions justified.
